actual_output:
I need a bit more information to proceed. Please provide the job description (or a link to the listing) and your current resume or core qualifications. 

Once I have those details, I will analyze the ATS keywords, identify the skills gap, and generate a customized resume and cover letter strategy for this specific role.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that it lacked the necessary context (job description and resume) to perform the task and asked the user for that information to proceed.
